text: I want to find out what the monks are trying to find out. I want to get rid of the barrier between myself and God.
text_zh: 我想知道那些僧侣们想要发现的东西。我想打通自己与上帝之间的屏障。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 拉里 上帝 屏障

text: I've been reading about the great philosophers of the East and I want to go to India and sit at the feet of the great masters there.
text_zh: 我一直在读东方伟大哲学家们的著作，我要去印度，坐在那些大师的脚下。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 印度 大师 拉里

text: I think the important thing is not to find any formulas, but to discover the quality of spirit that enables a man to get in touch with the divine.
text_zh: 我认为重要的不是找到什么公式，而是发现那种使人能够触及神圣的精神品质。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 精神品质 神圣 拉里

text: I don't think you're a coward, Larry. I think you're simply and solely a coward in the particular way that matters to me.
text_zh: 我不觉得你是懦夫，拉里。我觉得你只是在对我重要的那件事上是个懦夫。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 伊莎贝尔 懦夫 晃膀子

text: I loved my husband and my baby and they're dead. What's left? Nothing.
text_zh: 我爱我的丈夫和我的孩子，他们死了。剩下什么？什么都没有。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 苏菲 什么都没有

text: The sun goes down every day and I can't see why I should see tomorrow.
text_zh: 太阳每天落下去，可我为什么看不到明天？
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 苏菲 太阳 明天 名句

text: You are not looking for God. You are forgetting that you already are God. Forgetting is your only problem. Remembering is the only answer.
text_zh: 你不是在寻找上帝，你是在忆起你本身就是上帝。遗忘是你唯一的问题，忆起是唯一的答案。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 遗忘 忆起 上帝

text: I think the real difference between us is that you want to acquire a fortune and I want to acquire a life.
text_zh: 我觉得我们之间真正的区别是，你想积累一笔财产，而我想积累一生。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 财产 生活 拉里

text: I sat under that tree and I was not looking for anything. I was simply being. Being like a rock, being like the sky, being like a flame. And then I understood. The answer was never elsewhere.
text_zh: 我坐在那棵树下，不再寻找任何东西。我只是存在。像岩石一样存在，像天空一样广阔，像火焰一样明亮。然后我明白了。答案从来不在别处。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 菩提树 答案从来不在别处

text: I cannot save anyone. I can only show them the way. Whether they walk it is their own choice.
text_zh: 我无法拯救任何人。我只能给他们指一条路。他们走不走，那是他们自己的选择。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 无法拯救 选择 自由

text: I strove with none, for none was worth my strife; Nature I loved, and next to Nature, Art; I warmed both hands before the fire of Life; It sinks, and I am ready to depart.
text_zh: 我不与人争，因无人值得我争斗。我爱自然，其次爱与自然相近的艺术。我把双手伸向生命之火取暖。火萎了，我已准备好离开。
source_book: Dying Speech of an Old Philosopher
discussion_phrase: 兰德尔的诗 老哲学家 临终遗言

text: Spirituality without compassion is just ambition with better lighting. Compassion without spirituality is just sentimentality.
text_zh: 精神离开了慈悲就是野心，慈悲离开了精神就是感伤。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 慈悲 精神 野心

text: I don't believe in God, but I think maybe something was listening.
text_zh: 我不信上帝，但那一刻我觉得，也许有什么东西在听。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 苏菲 上帝 听

text: I saw the light. Not metaphorical light, but a real light that seemed to fill me and the universe at once.
text_zh: 我看见了光。不是比喻的光，而是一种真实的光，它似乎同时充满了我的身体和整个宇宙。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 看见光 苏伊士 灵性体验

text: I waited for you for years, Larry. I told myself I would wait, but I knew I was deceiving myself. I married him because I was afraid. Afraid of waiting for a man who might never come back.
text_zh: 我等了你好几年，拉里。我告诉我自己我会等你，但我知道我在骗自己。我嫁给他是因为我害怕。害怕等待一个可能永远不会回来的男人。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 伊莎贝尔 害怕 等待

text: I don't want life to have a meaning. I want to live in such a way that life itself becomes meaningless, and then the only thing that matters is living it fully.
text_zh: 我不想要生命有意义。我想以一种方式生活，让生命本身变得无意义，然后唯一重要的事就是充分地活着。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 生命 意义 充分活着

text: I am not at all sure that the first and most essential quality which makes a writer is a sense of grievance. Without it he may have talent, but not genius.
text_zh: 我一点也不确定，使一个作家成为作家的首要品质是委屈感。没有委屈感，他可能有才华，但不会有天才。
discussion_phrase: 刀锋 毛姆 作家 委屈感 天才
